title: PPM (Political Psychology Application and Research Center) Agression,Genderband Geopolitics: The cases of Iran and Ukraine 2022
content:
PPM (Political Psychology Application and Research Center) Agression,Genderband Geopolitics: The cases of Iran and Ukraine 2022

Prof. Dr. Babak Rezvani from the University of Amsterdam will hold a seminar on "Agression, Genderband Geopolitics: The cases of Iran and Ukraine 2022" on 12.12.2022 at 13:00.
